title: Power Artifacts + Underground Boxes
description: Adds powerful artifacts you can find in hidden underground structures.
body:
Adds powerful artifacts you can find in hidden underground structures.

includes...

Jetpack - gives double jump.

Flash Boots - makes you faster.

Grapple hook - allows you to travel large distances, uses hooks that need to be crafted.

Umbrella - allows the user to fall slowly.

Waterproof helmet - allows the user to breathe underwater.

Wings - allow the user to jump 3 times mid air and to fall slowly.

Demon Wings - allow the user to jump 5 times mid air

Leg day Leggings - allow to jump higher when sneaking and negates fall damage

 

 

New additions in 1.0.2 :

Infinite jetpack - can be crafted with lapislazuli and a jetpack and each jump deals damage to the armor.

 

 

SOME artifacts can be combined with diamond / netherite gear , and these can be smelted to remove 

the artifact, allowing better mod compatibility

 

5 structure types in the overworld

+3 extra nether structures

 

overworld structure (box style) have at least 1 surprise chest, having random "balanced"

vanilla-style loot and NOW includes a variety of powerful gamechanging artifacts.

 

Nether structures are beneficial, because they can contain netherite upgrades and netherite.
